questionHtml:
What is the name of this substance using IUPAC rules?

A.  2-ethyl-1-methylbutan-1-ol

B.  1-methyl-2-ethylbutan-1-ol

C.  3-ethylpentan-2-ol

D.  3-ethylpentan-4-ol

meta.title: What is the name of this substance using IUPAC rules? A. 2-ethyl-1-methylbutan-1-ol B. 1-methyl-2-ethylbutan-1-ol C. 3-ethylpentan-2-ol D. 3-ethylpentan-4-ol
